signal.description: Derive the next bounded tusq.dev roadmap increment after M27 from .planning/VISION.md. Focus on an unfulfilled vision module that is not already complete in ROADMAP, such as eval/regression infrastructure, rollout tooling, skill/domain grouping, runtime instrumentation, or capability-quality review. PM must update ROADMAP/SYSTEM_SPEC/PM_SIGNOFF/command-surface with one concrete M28-sized increment and explicit out-of-scope boundaries before implementation.
